title: viburnum plicatum f. watanabei
intro: Viburnum plicatum f. watanabei is a variety of the Japanese snowball tree, known for its compact growth habit and showy, white flowers that bloom in late spring. The plant is also valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viburnum plicatum f. watanabei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its flowers and leaves can also be used to make herbal tinctures and salves.
